summary: JG12 Iteration 15 - All 4 new Nutrition module features verified. Calendar visual shows ABRIL 2026 with day headers (L M X J V S D), day 15 highlighted orange (partial diet), day 22 with ring (today). PDF export works (3511 bytes). Auto-detect day type from routine working (Wednesday=rest). Date clickable opens calendar modal.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/diets/calendar/2026/4 returns 200 with year, month, days dict
✅ Backend: Calendar shows day 15 with status=partial, total_comidas=2
✅ Backend: GET /api/diets/2026-04-15/pdf returns 200 with PDF (3511 bytes)
✅ Backend: PDF has Content-Disposition: attachment; filename=dieta_jg12_2026-04-15.pdf
✅ Backend: GET /api/diets/1999-01-01/pdf returns 404 (no diet)
✅ Backend: GET /api/routines/current returns 200 with 7 days
✅ Backend: Routine has miércoles is_rest=true for auto-detect
✅ Backend: Diet for 2026-04-15 exists with C1 (pollo 200g, arroz 70g) and C2
✅ Frontend: NutritionPage shows 'DÍA DE DESCANSO' (auto-detected for today=Wednesday)
✅ Frontend: Calendar button found (data-testid=open-calendar-btn)
✅ Frontend: PDF export button found (data-testid=export-pdf-btn)
✅ Frontend: Save diet button found (data-testid=save-diet-btn)
✅ Frontend: Day type buttons found (tipo-dia-entrenamiento, tipo-dia-descanso)
✅ Frontend: Day summary found (data-testid=day-summary)
✅ Frontend: Nutrition page found (data-testid=nutrition-page)
✅ Frontend: Calendar modal opens with ABRIL 2026 header
✅ Frontend: Calendar has day headers L M X J V S D
✅ Frontend: Calendar day 15 button found (data-testid=cal-day-15)
✅ Frontend: Calendar day 22 (today) button found (data-testid=cal-day-22)
✅ Frontend: Clicking day 15 navigates to 'mié, 15 abr' and closes modal
✅ Frontend: PDF export shows 'PDF descargado' toast on success
✅ Frontend: Saved diet for April 15 shows foods (Carne picada 200g, Arroz 70g)
critical_code_review_comments: NutritionPage.jsx: Auto-detect useEffect correctly reads /api/routines/current and sets tipoDia based on is_rest field
NutritionPage.jsx: exportPdf function correctly fetches PDF blob and triggers download
DietCalendar.jsx: Calendar modal correctly shows month/year, day headers, and diet status indicators
diets.py: PDF endpoint correctly builds summary from saved diet and generates PDF via generate_diet_pdf()
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration15.py - Created comprehensive test suite for new features
seed_data_creation: Used existing saved diets for 2026-04-12 (partial) and 2026-04-15 (partial, 2 meals)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 verified all 4 new Nutrition features: 1) Calendar visual shows days with diet (green=complete, orange=partial), 2) PDF export via GET /api/diets/{fecha}/pdf works, 3) Auto-detect day type from routine (miércoles=rest), 4) Date clickable opens calendar modal. Today is Wednesday April 22, 2026 which is a rest day. Saved diets exist for 2026-04-12 and 2026-04-15. All data-testids working: open-calendar-btn, export-pdf-btn, diet-calendar-modal, cal-day-15, cal-day-22, tipo-dia-entrenamiento, tipo-dia-descanso, day-summary, save-diet-btn.
